notifications.required: Notifications are required to receive task and attendance information
notifications.requestBlocked: Notifications blocked. Open Settings to enable
notifications.requestDenied: Notifications denied. You will not receive important alerts

location.required: Location is required for attendance and shift tracking
location.requestBlocked: Location blocked. Open Settings to enable
location.requestDenied: Location denied. Attendance feature will not work

backgroundLocation.androidOldNote: Background location not required on Android 9 and earlier
backgroundLocation.checkFailed: Failed to check background location permission
backgroundLocation.foregroundRequired: Foreground location must be enabled first
backgroundLocation.requestBlocked: Background location blocked. Open Settings → Permissions → Location → Allow all the time
backgroundLocation.requestDenied: Background location denied. Shift tracking may be inaccurate
backgroundLocation.requestFailed: Failed to request background location permission

camera.required: Camera is required for work report photos
camera.requestBlocked: Camera blocked. Open Settings to enable
camera.requestDenied: Camera denied. You cannot take report photos

gallery.required: Gallery is required to select report photos from storage
gallery.requestBlocked: Gallery blocked. Open Settings to enable
gallery.requestDenied: Gallery denied. You cannot select photos from storage
